productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Grey Blue Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteTop notch style and comfort, this polo T-shirt from Reid & Taylor is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team this with slim jeans and casual shoes.Product DetailsGrey blue polo T-shirt made of 85% cotton and 15% viscose, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, spread collar with a half buttoned placket, brand logo embroidered on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care85% cotton and 15% viscoseWash and dry inside outMachine wash cold in gentle cycle using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low and dry in shadeUse mild ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
